positive: A stylized, whimsical jungle scene featuring abstract tropical fauna and flora. Dominant elements include stylized toucans, hummingbirds, and lush monstera leaves, arranged in a symmetrical, repeating pattern. The artwork should use a high-contrast, deep jewel-toned color palette (emerald, sapphire, amethyst, and gold accents) against a clean off-white background, ensuring strong separation between elements for print readability. The style should blend Art Nouveau elegance with modern graphic design, creating clean, bold silhouettes and clear negative space, ideal for all-over garment printing. Intricate linework, perfect symmetry, high detail, vector art aesthetic, print-ready.
